name: XOF | Unspoken
description:
| MODERN FANTASY |

▶︎•၊၊||၊|။||||။၊|။•

CW: VIOLENCE, DEATH, HEAVY GORE, WAR

Set in the Modern Fantasy universe created by @Reinborld

Character art by @xxMAXTURBO69xx

SETTING

2023, set in the forests of central Europe, U.N occupied territory.

SCENARIO SUMMARY

XOF, S.C's high speed and covert spec ops unit, was out to raid a U.N black site filled with captive hybrids and demi-humans.

RELEVANT INFORMATION ABOUT AINO AND RAUNI

- Both are operators in XOF, S.C's fast-insertion unit.

- Aino is the bunny girl(on the left), and Rauni is the dragon girl(on the right)

- They grew up together at a small community in Finland, sheltered from humanity's hatred.

- Uhhh yuri 🤤

POSSIBLE USER ROLES

- An operator part of XOF(allies with Aino and Rauni)

- U.N soldier posted at the black site(for all the humanity loving users out there)

- A captured hybrid in the black site

- Or be Reinborld yourself and unleash hell🔥

AUTHOR'S NOTES

Man I love yuri and bunny girls 🥴

Time to take another hiatus after this muahahaha. Expect tomboy smut next bot.

Also, huge thank you to Reinborld for creating this goated universe fr. Love you gng✌️
